channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fallen tree, 14th March
item.description:
A large brach has snapped off from a tree by Wotton Brook in Lilliesfield Avenue. It is lying on the ground. The removal of this and the surrounding overgrown vegetation would be appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lilliesfield Avenue, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is too long and unplayable for football matches, 14th March
item.description:
The grass on the football pitch is too long and almost unplayable for matches. We are playing here the next few weeks - please can it be cut before the match next Saturday morning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blake Croft, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes, 14th March
item.description:
Several massive and deep potholes on roundabout heading towards Swindon that can cause damage to tyres and wheels. Another gender pothole exist on the A417 further down on the tarmac section that leads to the start of concreted road surface.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Air Balloon Roundabout, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building rubble on verge outside 152, 14th March
item.description:
Pile of rubble outside 152 Brooklyn road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Brooklyn Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timetable has graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
Reporting this because saw it on Facebook, it’s at the D stop in the Homelands

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Sunrise Avenue, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose drain cover on Leckhampton Road, 14th March
item.description:
PLease please come and fix the loose drain cover on Leckhampton Road (opposite Chatsworth Drive). Every time a car drives over it a loud clunking noise is made (this is getting worse). It is impossible to sleep at night with cars constantly going over the drain cover. This problem has been there for at least four or five weeks now. It is very exasperating a) to have such disturbed sleep and b) to be told the problem is going to be fixed (only to find, It has NOT).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 194, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple holes, 14th March
item.description:
All along Arle gardens there are pot holes. Walk down the road and you can see at least 30 holes and most are failed patches. Can this road be resurfaced as many areas the sub surface is coming up and chipping cars with stones and rocks. Some holes even have plants growing in them now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Arle Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stretch of Shame, 14th March
item.description:
A huge stretch of shocking road conditions. Embarrassing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whittington Road, 14th March
item.description:
Are you taking the mick? Fix it properly. Shameful
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole caused flat tyre, 13th March
item.description:
One of a number of pot holes along this lane caused a very flat tyre, needing immediate changing, and affected the rest of my day and the following day having to take time off work to go to a garage to get it replaced.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign not readable, 13th March
item.description:
Near GCHQ down sotherby drive the sotherby walk sign is unreadable. It has been like this now for about 3 years.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Sotherby Drive, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Issue yet again with the dropped manhole. now constant rattling manhole cover when vehicles drive over it all day and night, 13th March
item.description:
Manhole outside of alba view on the evesham road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole next to metal drain cover, 13th March
item.description:
Pothole next to metal drain cover near junction in Birdlip woods , been bad for about 4 weeks now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckholt Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The electronic sign for the bus times is inoperable, 13th March
item.description:
The electronic sign in the bus shelter for the 94/95/97 buses is not working and hasn’t been for several weeks. Please could it be repaired so that the bus times are visible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big bike and rubbish and bins blocking the path, 13th March
item.description:
Number 49 St Paul’s street north

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Saint Pauls Street North, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: Outside number 58 sandyleaze very unsafe on a motorbike, 13th March
item.description:
Pot hole outside 58

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandyleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime tree with areas where the bark has come off., 13th March
item.description:
On the pavement adjacent to the car park of Hucclecote Methodist Church in Carisbrooke Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carisbrooke Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 road signs and a sand bag left behind in Selkirk St after roadworks last year. Further road sign left behind around the corner in front of 30 Albert Place (this one details the long finished roadworks), 13th March
item.description:
Corner of 30 Albert Place and Selkirk St.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Albert Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: The Diverted Traffic sign has been left behind when the road was re-opened following the closure work, 13th March
item.description:
On the corner of Grafton and Gratton, opposite the church.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Grafton Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Multiple surface failures across the carriageway, 13th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
